agents.name: Dashboard Agent
agents.description: Builds the command center metrics snapshot from every store and writes it for the web dashboard.

agents.name: GitHub SEO Agent
agents.description: Proposes public repositories for the vynix-in organization and generates READMEs, docs, examples and release notes. Never publishes automatically.

agents.name: Changelog SEO Agent
agents.description: Turns releases and notable commits into blog drafts, release notes and social drafts.

agents.name: Blog Agent
agents.description: Writes in-depth, original blog articles and renders them as full SEO HTML pages with images, clips, structured data and internal links.

agents.name: Listicle Agent
agents.description: Builds high commercial-intent best-of and alternatives pages with ItemList and FAQ schema.

agents.name: Use-case Agent
agents.description: Builds persona landing pages (for agencies, QA, startups, designers and more).

agents.name: Distribution Agent
agents.description: Turns each post into ready-to-paste drafts for X, LinkedIn, Reddit, dev.to and Hashnode, with canonical back-links.

agents.name: Backlinks and Outreach Agent
agents.description: Maintains a curated list of outreach targets: communities, newsletters, podcasts and guest-post sites.

agents.name: Glossary Agent
agents.description: Builds substantial definition pages for terms developers search, with DefinedTerm and FAQ schema.

agents.name: Directory Discovery Agent
agents.description: Maintains the master list of directories where Vynix can be listed for backlinks and discovery.

agents.name: Submission Preparation Agent
agents.description: Builds copy-paste ready submission packets for every discovered directory.

agents.name: Open Source Funnel Agent
agents.description: Reviews the codebase and proposes safe components to open source, with proprietary parts excluded.

agents.name: Comparison Page Agent
agents.description: Generates and updates competitor comparison pages from a shared template.

agents.name: Knowledge Base Agent
agents.description: Turns issues, fixes and releases into sanitized knowledge base articles, FAQs and troubleshooting guides.

agents.name: Internal Linking Agent
agents.description: Audits all generated content and suggests internal links, topic clusters and hub pages.

agents.name: Site Builder Agent
agents.description: Assembles index pages, sitemap.xml and robots.txt into a deployable static site under content/site.

agents.name: Reviewer Agent
agents.description: Audits every generated page for SEO correctness, valid structured data, working internal links, enough content, and a clean publication-gate scan. Holds back anything that fails.

agents.name: Crawler Agent
agents.description: Crawls every published link, verifies it is live, and produces the manual-submission URL list.
